SQLLite.SQL: SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') AS "Transfer" FROM WARRANTS W WHERE W.WARRANT_ID = ${param.warrantId} AND W.CCBC_WARRANT = 'Y' AND W.WARRANT_TYPE IN ('EXECUTION','CONTROL') AND EXISTS (SELECT NULL FROM COURTS CRT WHERE CRT.CODE = 335 AND CRT.SUPS_CENTRALISED_FLAG = 'N')

Security.roles: medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2
